summary: Successfully verified ProtectedRoute redirect fix. All protected routes now correctly redirect unauthenticated users to landing page instead of showing infinite loading spinner. Italian UI and Emergent auth integration working perfectly.
passed_tests: Dashboard protection - unauthenticated users redirected to landing page (no infinite spinner)
Landing page loads with proper Italian UI ('Il Diritto, Semplificato')
Login button redirects correctly to Emergent auth (auth.emergentagent.com)
No loading spinners detected on any redirects
Rapid navigation test passed - no race conditions
